## LibraryRuntime.Ingredient class

Static factory for creating runtime ingredients. This class cannot be instantiated - use create() to get the appropriate concrete type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare abstract class Ingredient 
```

## Example


```typescript
const result = Ingredient.create(context, id, ingredient);
if (result.isSuccess()) {
  const ingredient = result.value;
  if (ingredient.isChocolate()) {
    console.log(ingredient.chocolateType);
  }
}
```
